name_en: BOTTEGA VENETA new mini COBBLE hobo bag. This season's mini Cobble series brings a new handbag style. The bag body resembles a 'hobo' shape, bringing good luck for the whole autumn and winter! This hobo bag is made of three pieces of padding, with a seamless body and no lining, showcasing quiet strength. The bag is carefully designed to create a three-dimensional feel. The connection points and edges are finished with leather strips for a minimalist look. The bag has no separate lining, allowing you to appreciate the lamb leather inside and out, which is beautiful both inside and out. The top handle is made of a leather-wrapped rope, quite sturdy. The detachable shoulder strap is fixed with a leather ring on the bag. Can be carried by hand, worn on the shoulder, or crossbody. Super easy to match!
